summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Data Center feature. All core functionality working correctly including navigation, stats display, business profile management, upload interface, and AI integration with business context.

design_issues.issue: User sessions expire relatively quickly requiring frequent re-login

passed_tests: Data Center navigation appears in sidebar and is clickable
Data Center page loads with correct stats cards (Total Files, Storage Used, Categories, Profile Complete)
All three tabs (Files & Documents, Business Profile, Upload) are present and functional
Business Profile tab displays form with all required fields
Business Profile data can be filled and saved successfully
Upload tab shows file input, category selector, and description field
Category dropdown works with multiple options (Financial & Accounting, etc.)
AI Advisor integration recognizes business context and personalizes responses
AI greets user by name (John) and references business (Johns Consulting, Professional Services)
Upload form validation works (upload button disabled without file)
Drag and drop upload interface is present and functional
